includes.expression: [String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).Overlay,OverlayWatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(0).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(0).DBID) + Integer.IsGreater(ListItem(0).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(0).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_0]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).Overlay,OverlayWatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(1).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(1).DBID) + Integer.IsGreater(ListItem(1).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(1).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_1]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).Overlay,OverlayWatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(2).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(2).DBID) + Integer.IsGreater(ListItem(2).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(2).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_2]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).Overlay,OverlayWatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(3).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(3).DBID) + Integer.IsGreater(ListItem(3).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(3).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_3]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem.Overlay,OverlayWatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem.Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem.DBID) + Integer.IsGreater(ListItem.PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem.IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).Overlay,OverlayUnwatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(0).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(0).DBID) + Integer.IsEqual(ListItem(0).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(0).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(0).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_0]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).Overlay,OverlayUnwatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(1).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(1).DBID) + Integer.IsEqual(ListItem(1).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(1).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(1).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_1]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).Overlay,OverlayUnwatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(2).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(2).DBID) + Integer.IsEqual(ListItem(2).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(2).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(2).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_2]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).Overlay,OverlayUnwatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem(3).Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem(3).DBID) + Integer.IsEqual(ListItem(3).PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem(3).DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem(3).IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress_3]

[String.IsEqual(ListItem.Overlay,OverlayUnwatched.png) | String.IsEmpty(ListItem.Overlay) + !String.IsEmpty(ListItem.DBID) + Integer.IsEqual(ListItem.PlayCount,0) + [ String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,movie) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,tvshow) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,season) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,episode) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,set) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,musicvideo) | String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,video) ]] + !ListItem.IsPlaying + !$EXP[IsInProgress]
